metadata.description: Claude Best Practices Hub — capabilities packaged as installable Claude Code plugins (Goal 6). Install a plugin into any project and update it centrally from this marketplace.

plugins.name: prompt-auto-enhance
plugins.description: Diagnose-and-strengthen the user's prompt before it runs, with a fully toggleable enhancement pipeline (triggers, verbosity, grade card, independent reviewer, clarification gate) plus the workflow's own self-enforcement. Every criterion is an on/off switch, all default ON; edit enhance-settings.json and behavior auto-adjusts next turn.

plugins.name: auto-analytics
plugins.description: Autonomous Google Analytics 4 for any project: /auto-analytics detects the stack, provisions the GA4 property + web stream via a service-account key (no browser login), injects the gtag + Consent Mode v2 + blanket ui_click snippet into source, verifies a real hit browser-free, and records the Measurement ID in a project-local inventory. Bundles the analytics-setup engine so it works standalone. One-time service-account key is the only human step; falls back to guided manual without it.
